quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. West 'trails at $1,414.82, roughly 65% of North's total' and 'no single region contributing more than about 30% of the total.'

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products, regions, and figures — 'Investigate West's underperformance ($1,414.82, the lowest region) to close its gap with North ($2,176.35)' and 'Bundle low-priced Sprockets with Widgets... despite the highest unit volume (238 units).'

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like Gadget's revenue efficiency ('$2,392.00 in revenue from only 16 units'), Sprocket's volume/revenue mismatch, and regional balance ('no single region contributing more than about 30%').
